samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>Implement an ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]"></input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]"></input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]"></input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]"></output>
        <output id="zero"></output>
        <output id="carry"></output>
        <output id="negative"></output>
        <output id="overflow"></output>
        <output id="flag"></output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="ADD" value="6'b100000"></enum>
        <enum id="ADDU" value="6'b100001"></enum>
        <enum id="SUB" value="6'b100010"></enum>
        <enum id="SUBU" value="6'b100011"></enum>
        <enum id="AND" value="6'b100100"></enum>
        <enum id="OR" value="6'b100101"></enum>
        <enum id="XOR" value="6'b100110"></enum>
        <enum id="NOR" value="6'b100111"></enum>
        <enum id="SLT" value="6'b101010"></enum>
        <enum id="SLTU" value="6'b101011"></enum>
        <enum id="SLL" value="6'b000000"></enum>
        <enum id="SRL" value="6'b000010"></enum>
        <enum id="SRA" value="6'b000011"></enum>
        <enum id="SLLV" value="6'b000100"></enum>
        <enum id="SRLV" value="6'b000110"></enum>
        <enum id="SRAV" value="6'b000111"></enum>
        <enum id="LUI" value="6'b001111"></enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <enum_use id="ADD"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="ADDU"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="SUB"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="SUBU"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="AND"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="OR"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="XOR"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="NOR"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="SLT"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="SLTU"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="SLL"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="SRL"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="SRA"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="SLLV"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="SRLV"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="SRAV"></enum_use>
        <enum_use id="LUI"></enum_use>
        <wire id="res" width_description="[32:0]"></wire>
        <wire id="a_signed"></wire>
        <wire id="b_signed"></wire>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    assign zero = (res[31:0] == {32{1'b0}}) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
    assign carry = (aluc == SUB) ? ((a>=b) ? 1'b0 : 1'b1) : ((res[32] == 1'b1) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0);
    assign negative = (res[31] == 1'b1) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
    assign overflow = (((aluc==ADD)||(aluc==ADDU))&&(a[31]==b[31])&&(a[31]!=res[31])) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
    assign flag = (aluc==SLT) ? (negative ^ overflow) :
                  (aluc==SLTU) ? (a<b) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0 :
                  1'b0;
    assign a_signed = $signed(a);
    assign b_signed = $signed(b);
    always @(*) begin
        case (aluc)
            ADD: begin
                res = a_signed + b_signed;
            end
            ADDU: begin
                res = a + b;
            end
            SUB: begin
                res = a_signed - b_signed;
            end
            SUBU: begin
                res = a - b;
            end
            AND: begin
                res = a & b;
            end
            OR: begin
                res = a | b;
            end
            XOR: begin
                res = a ^ b;
            end
            NOR: begin
                res = ~(a | b);
            end
            SLT: begin
                res = a_signed < b_signed;
            end
            SLTU: begin
                res = a < b;
            end
            SLL: begin
                res = a << b[4:0];
            end
            SRL: begin
                res = a >> b[4:0];
            end
            SRA: begin
                res = a_signed >>> b[4:0];
            end
            SLLV: begin
                res = a << b[4:0];
            end
            SRLV: begin
                res = a >> b[4:0];
            end
            SRAV: begin
                res = a_signed >>> b[4:0];
            end
            LUI: begin
                res = {a[15:0], 16'b0};
            end
            default: begin
                res = {33{1'bz}};
            end
        endcase
    end
    </implementation>
</module>
